ksa_text: Knowledge of IT service management principles as applied to data services, including service catalog design, service level management, incident and problem management, and continual service improvement.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Strategies to maximize AI benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, prepared, implemented, documented, and informed by input from relevant AI actors.

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of critical information technology (IT) procurement requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Operations & Program Management KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.428) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.428 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Operations & Program Management. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Operations & Program Management is not sufficiently central to the Director of AI/ML to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Operations & Program Management is not a standard competency expectation for Director of AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.428) and edge-domain placement (Operations & Program Management) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
